Data Processing and MNPI Handling Notice between Bamboo River Energy JSC (controller) and Petal Cloud Services LLC (processor), applicable to issuer, employee, banking, and transaction records in Vietnam.
Personal data is processed under Decree 13 (information associated with or helping identify a specific person), and material non-public information under the Securities Law (issuer/securities information not yet public with significant price impact).
Ms. Lê Thu Minh (DOB 1992-03-17), Investor Relations Officer at Bamboo River Energy JSC, based at Emerald Tower, Q.3, Ho Chi Minh City, uses OrchidBook Pro 14 S/N BR-IR-0091; staff code IR-037; payroll bank at Sun Lotus Bank account ****7431; IR-Portal session ID 7f9c2d; email minh.lt@bambooriver.vn.
MNPI examples include the HGX listing application draft, Q2 preliminary revenue figures, private placement term sheet, and merger discussion “Seagrass”; access is restricted to IR/Finance and logged with classification “MNPI-Red.”
Retention for MNPI working files is 180 days post-disclosure, with quarterly access reviews, immutable audit logs, and device-level encryption; non-MNPI HR records follow a 36‑month retention workflow.
Employee banking and transaction data processed include salary transfers, per diem reimbursements, and vendor settlements; example transaction reference BR-PAY-2026-0412 (issuer ledger only).
Data subject rights include access, correction, deletion, and portability; contact privacy@bambooriver.vn or +84 930 123 456; trụ sở: Tầng 12, Tháp Emerald, 88 Phố Gió, Q.1, TP.HCM.
We also collect non-identified metrics such as age band 25–34, device type “Android,” and city “Đà Lạt,” which do not individually identify any person.
A vendor risk form may record DOB 1988-11-04, role “compliance analyst,” location “Hải Phòng,” device OrchidPhone X (IMEI suffix 5538), and user tag “cn-17,” without names or direct identifiers.
Cross-border transfers to CirrusStack SG (Singapore) follow Decree 13 cross-border requirements, with VN Standard Transfer Clauses, pseudonymization of staff codes, encryption at rest, and retention logs reviewed monthly.
Operational telemetry may include VPN IP ranges 203.190.* and session code “vpn-hgx-73”; such logs are not linked to named profiles except for security incident resolution.
If MNPI leakage is suspected, we freeze IR drives (folder “IR-HGX-prelist-2026”), notify the National Securities Registry of Vietnam within 72 hours, and inform the HGX market surveillance unit.
Staff are subject to policy BR-Policy-17: trading blackout windows around HGX listing milestones; IR/Finance may not trade Bamboo River Energy equity or derivatives; acknowledgments tracked via token ack-IR-034.
Petal Cloud Services LLC must not retain login cookies beyond 30 days (cookie “_brsess_”), must rotate encryption keys monthly, and must support deletion within 15 days of DSAR completion.
We avoid collecting citizen ID numbers, household books, or exact home addresses unless strictly necessary for payroll tax compliance and documented in DPIA-2026-IR-09.
Mr. Trần Quang Hậu, Data Protection Officer, dpo@bambooriver.vn; for securities disclosure queries, contact Ms. Nguyễn Thu Vân at investorrelations@bambooriver.vn; giờ làm việc: 09:00–17:30 ICT.
